g.c_para: package`HDMI-SMD_HX-HDMI-19PIN`Contributor`lcsc`Supplier`LCSC`Supplier Part`C5184845`Manufacturer`hanxia(韩下)`Manufacturer Part`HX HDMI 19PIN`JLCPCB Part Class`Extended Part`spicePre`U`spiceSymbolName`HX HDMI 19PIN`

g.text: EXTCLK trace should be as short as possible
Consider connecting #OE to an FTS pin. If #OE goes high, it shuts down servos
Analog Inputs: RA0-RA3, RA5, RE0-RE2, RB0-RB5

g.text: For all RF parts, the Capacitor combo is 0.1uF for HF transients, 1uF for Mid and 22uF for bulk power
